message:
feat: add opencode-ai to default container AI tool suite

- Add opencode-ai CLI tool to npm installation list
- Completes comprehensive AI agent ecosystem
- Maintains feature parity while using Microsoft devcontainer features

AI agents now included:
- Sourcegraph Amp, Qwen Code, Google Gemini, GitHub Copilot
- OpenAI Codex, Claude Code, and OpenCode AI

All tools installed via Microsoft features foundation with proper
environment handling and no Cargo path issues.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -68,6 +68,7 @@
       "npm install -g @github/copilot",
       "npm install -g @openai/codex",
       "npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code",
+      "npm install -g opencode-ai",
       "echo 'All AI CLI tools installed successfully'"
     ]
   },
